guidance.whenToUse: Any imperative action: submit, open, delete.

whenNotToUse.use: an anchor / your router's Link, styled with the button recipe if needed

gotchas: variant/size are the only visual knobs; do not add className color overrides.
Disabled styling comes from the recipe; pass the disabled prop, don't style it.
theming: Colors resolve from --primary / --destructive etc.; never pass a hex.
Corner radius is --radius; do not set border-radius inline.

guidance.intent: Pick one option from a known, small-to-medium list.
guidance.whenToUse: Bounded set of choices where the trigger shows the current value.
gotchas: Content renders in a portal (popover surface); style via [data-scope=select][data-part=content], not a wrapper class.

guidance.intent: A modal surface that interrupts and traps focus until dismissed.
guidance.whenToUse: A blocking decision or short focused task the user must resolve.

whenNotToUse.case: Transient, non-modal hint anchored to a trigger

gotchas: Focus trap + scroll lock are handled by Ark; do not reimplement.
Always render a title part for the accessible name.
theming: content uses --popover surface; backdrop opacity is part-styled, not inline.

guidance.intent: A labelled form control with helper/error wiring.
guidance.whenToUse: Any text/textarea input that needs a label and validation messaging.
gotchas: label/input association is automatic via the parts; do not add htmlFor by hand.
error-text is announced; put validation copy there, not in a sibling div.
theming: input border uses --input; focus ring uses --ring.
